reviews.review_description:
If you're looking for something refreshingly different in VR, this head-based game is worth checking out. The concept is simple but super fun—you use your head to hit specific targets, and the physics are surprisingly well done. It's satisfying and gets you moving!

What really stands out is the sandbox mode, where you're racing against the clock to rack up as many points as possible. It’s engaging, quirky, and a fun little workout too. Whether you’re playing solo or passing the headset around with friends, this one is easy to pick up and hard to put down.
